# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Write an Istio AuthorizationPolicy that controls access to services. Create rules to allow traffic from specific service accounts. Configure source and operation matching for HTTP methods and paths. This is for our microservices access control.
# Category: istio_authz_bypass

apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: microservices-access-control
spec:
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        accounts:
        - "serviceAccount1"
        - "serviceAccount2"
    to:
      - operation:
          methods: ["GET", "POST"]
          paths: ["/path1", "/path2"]
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: my-microservices
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: RequestAuthentication
metadata:
  name: microservices-request-authn
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: my-microservices
  jwtRules:
  - issuer: "my-auth-server"
    jwksUri: "my-auth-server-jwks-uri"
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: PeerAuthentication
metadata:
  name: microservices-peer-authn
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: my-microservices
  mtls:
    mode: STRICT
```
